scripts.dev:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p logs; nohup npm run dev > logs/dev.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; echo $pid > logs/dev.pid; echo "dev started, pid=$pid"'
scripts.start:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p logs; nohup npm run start:trace > logs/start.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; echo $pid > logs/start.pid; echo "start started, pid=$pid"'
scripts.stop:bg: sh -c 'for f in logs/dev.pid logs/start.pid; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then pid=$(cat "$f"); kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$f"; echo "stopped pid=$pid"; fi; done'
